title: Assign users to a board different board default views
excerpt:

posts.author: dwadsworth (Dustin Wadsworth)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the ability to create custom board views… then assign specific users to specific views as their default view for the board.

This would allow different work groups to access the board in a view that is tailored to their workflow.
